creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
This bug isn't related to boehm-gc itself, but to application
that uses it. Boehmgc is a very dangerous component and should
be used properly, furthermore the way it should be used depends
on how the library was configured. That's why some ports
(e.g. lang/Sather) uses static-compiled boehm-gc library with
specific configuration. Probably we should do the same thing
in the inkscape port...

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
